summary: Stripe webhook fix and meeting access control - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI checks passed. The Stripe webhook no longer crashes with SyntaxError (returns 400 'Invalid signature' as expected). Meeting access control correctly locks meeting_join_url for non-finalized participants.

backend: GET /api/invitations/{token} for 'accepted' (physical) - meeting_join_url N/A as expected
POST /api/invitations/{token}/respond with action=accept for no-penalty sets status to 'accepted'
Access control logic verified: only 'accepted' and 'accepted_guaranteed' are finalized
frontend: InvitationPage for 'accepted_pending_guarantee': Status badge shows 'Garantie en cours'
InvitationPage for 'accepted_pending_guarantee': Locked message 'Accès au rendez-vous verrouillé' displayed
InvitationPage for 'accepted_pending_guarantee': ICS download button correctly hidden
InvitationPage for 'accepted_pending_guarantee': Proof/meeting link correctly hidden
InvitationPage for 'accepted_pending_guarantee': 'Compléter la garantie' button shown
InvitationPage for 'accepted_guaranteed': ICS download button visible
InvitationPage for 'accepted_guaranteed': Check-in section accessible (not locked)

critical_code_review_comments: stripe_guarantee_service.py: handle_checkout_completed is now sync-only (no await), email logic moved to webhooks.py
webhooks.py line 24: stripe_webhook is async def, correctly handles email sending with await
invitations.py lines 124-127: is_engagement_finalized check correctly implemented
InvitationPage.js line 523: isEngaged check correctly gates check-in section access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe webhook fix verified - no longer crashes with SyntaxError. Meeting access control working: meeting_join_url is empty for 'accepted_pending_guarantee' and 'invited' statuses, but returned for 'accepted' and 'accepted_guaranteed'. No-penalty acceptance flow sets status directly to 'accepted'. Test file test_stripe_webhook_access_control.py created for regression testing.

bug_fixed.issue: Stripe webhook handler crashing with SyntaxError (await in sync function)
bug_fixed.root_cause: handle_checkout_completed in stripe_guarantee_service.py was sync but contained await for email sending
bug_fixed.fix: Email logic moved to webhooks.py (async router) which can properly await EmailService
bug_fixed.verification: Webhook now returns 400 'Invalid signature' for unsigned requests instead of 500 SyntaxError
